ZypheroLab

Summary:
- ZypheroLab builds high-performance, conversion-focused websites for small and medium businesses.
- Core services: web design, technical SEO, AI-search optimization, conversion optimization.
- Primary market: Romania (RO), with Romanian-first content; English version at https://zypherolab.com/en/
- Typography is self-hosted (WOFF2); no third-party font CDN required for normal page loads.

Key facts:
- First functional site draft is often delivered in 3-5 business days (see on-page FAQ and proof strip); fuller launches vary by scope.
- Focus metrics: qualified leads, conversion rate, Core Web Vitals, organic visibility.
- Contact paths: lead form on `/#contact` (Formspree endpoint) and WhatsApp +40 747 821 384 (links use https://wa.me/40747821384).

Implementation (for humans and coding assistants):
- Static HTML/CSS/JS; no build step. Optional extended notes may live in a local `docs/` folder (not published to the public repo). Root `AGENTS.md` in the repo is a short pointer only.
- Visible copy is bilingual: Romanian in `/index.html`, English in `/en/index.html`, with runtime string sync via `js/i18n.js` (including `<title>` and meta when JS runs). Keep static HTML fallbacks aligned with `STRINGS.ro` / `STRINGS.en` for no-JS and first paint.

Canonical URL:
- https://zypherolab.com/

Primary sections (main commercial order after hero):
- Hero: value proposition; primary CTAs to `#contact` (quote) and WhatsApp; trust badges (response time, draft window, entry price).
- Services (`#services`), Offer (`#offer`), compact proof strip (response SLA, typical delivery, scope path, post-launch support).
- Portfolio (`#results`): challenge / solution / outcome lines per card; testimonials; process; pricing; subscriptions; about; facts; FAQ.
- Simulator (`#simulator`): late-stage “AI website generator” preview (business name, type, accent color, style); in-page preview only (no backend). After preview, CTA continues to `#contact`.
- Contact (`#contact`): lead form (client-side validation + Formspree) and WhatsApp.
